SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-17-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-16-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WHEELS FINANCIAL GROUP LLC DBA LOANMART IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM REPRESENTED BY DIEGO ERAZO, SUPERVISOR LEGAL DEPARTMENT. DEFENDANT SHIRLEY HOPE CISNEROZ IS PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $2635 (INCLUDES COSTS) TO THE PLAINTIFF TO BE MADE MONTHLY IN A 13-MONTH PAYMENT PLAN. THE FIRST PAYMENT IS DUE ON DEC-10-2021, WITH SUBSEQUENT PAYMENTS OF $200 DUE ON THE 10TH OF EACH MONTH. THE LAST PAYMENT DATE ON FEB-10-2023 IS FOR $235. PLAINTIFF WILL SEND DEFENDANT'S AUTO TITLE BACK TO THE DEFENDANT BY DEC-31-2021. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE MAR-16-2022 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE, OR THE AGREEMENT IS BROKEN, AND A JUDGEMENT WILL BE RENDERED AT THAT TIME. PROGRESS REPORTS SHALL BE DONE IN FOUR-MONTH INTERVALS. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PARTIES WILL ARRANGE PAYMENT METHOD. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
